chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 1203 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.9949/2023 (U/A): 2. For orders on CMA No.9950/2023 (U/S 151 CPC): 07.07.2023: Mr. Furqan Ali, Advocate for the Plaintiff............. 1. Granted. 2. Counsel for the Plaintiff has filed this application for withdrawal of the present suit. The Court has perused the Vakalatnama as well as the authority letter of the Board of Directors of the Plaintiff where in Syed Asad Naqvi has been appointed to file this lis. Accordingly, the application is allowed and the suit stands disposed of. J U D G E
